message.content:
Create 4 email template markdown files in C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\docs\launch\emails\. The directories already exist. Use the Write tool to create each file. Do NOT commit (I will commit all content together).

**File 1: docs/launch/emails/01-welcome.md**

```
# Email 1: Welcome to the Waitlist

**Subject:** You're on the list — here's what's coming
**Trigger:** Immediately after signup
**From:** Founder Name <hello@citedby.ai>

---

Hi {{name}},

Welcome aboard! You're **#{{signup_number}}** on the CitedBy.ai waitlist.

{{#if founding_tier_top100}}
🌟 **Founding Member status unlocked!** As one of our first 100 members, you've secured a **lifetime 30% discount** on any plan. This is our way of saying thanks for believing in us early.
{{/if}}

{{#if founding_tier_top500}}
🚀 **Early Adopter perk unlocked!** As one of our first 500 members, you've earned **3 months free** on our Pro plan when we launch.
{{/if}}

### What is CitedBy.ai?

We're building the first platform for **AI Engine Optimization (AEO)** — helping your brand get cited and recommended by ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, and Gemini.

Think of it as SEO, but for the AI-powered search era.

### What's next?

- **Week 1-2:** We're finishing final preparations
- **Week 3:** You'll get a sneak peek of the dashboard
- **Launch day:** You'll be first in line to try it

Stay connected:
- [Follow us on Twitter/X](https://twitter.com/citedbyai)
- [Follow us on LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/company/citedbyai)

Talk soon,
{{founder_name}}
Founder, CitedBy.ai
```

**File 2: docs/launch/emails/02-value-aeo.md**

```
# Email 2: Is Your Brand Invisible to ChatGPT?

**Subject:** Is your brand invisible to ChatGPT?
**Trigger:** Day 3 after signup
**From:** Founder Name <hello@citedby.ai>

---

Hi {{name}},

Quick question: have you ever asked ChatGPT to recommend a product in your industry?

Try it. Ask: *"What are the best {{industry}} tools in 2026?"*

If your brand doesn't appear... you have an AI visibility problem.

### The numbers are stark:

- **68% of ChatGPT responses** don't cite any sources at all
- The brands that DO get cited follow specific patterns in their content structure
- Traditional SEO helps with Google — but AI engines use completely different signals

### This is what AEO (AI Engine Optimization) solves.

AEO is the practice of optimizing your online presence so AI engines — ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini — cite and recommend your brand in their responses.

It's not about keywords and backlinks. It's about:
- **Structured data** (Schema.org, JSON-LD)
- **E-E-A-T signals** (Expertise, Experience, Authority, Trust)
- **AI-readable content** (llms.txt, robots.txt for AI bots)
- **Source of truth** pages that AI can reference

### CitedBy.ai does all of this for you.

We're launching soon. You're already on the waitlist (#{{signup_number}}).

Stay tuned,
{{founder_name}}
```

**File 3: docs/launch/emails/03-social-proof.md**

```
# Email 3: Momentum Update

**Subject:** {{waitlist_count}} people are already on the waitlist
**Trigger:** Day 7 after signup
**From:** Founder Name <hello@citedby.ai>

---

Hi {{name}},

Quick update from CitedBy.ai HQ:

**{{waitlist_count}} people** have joined the waitlist since we announced. The response has been incredible.

### Who's signing up?

- SEO agencies looking to offer AEO as a new service
- SaaS founders who realized they're invisible to AI search
- Content publishers who want to be THE source AI engines cite

### What we're building for you:

✅ **AI Visibility Score** — Instant audit across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini
✅ **15+ optimization tools** — Schema.org, llms.txt, E-E-A-T builder, content writer
✅ **Real-time bot monitoring** — See when GPTBot and ClaudeBot crawl your site
✅ **Reputation tracking** — Know what AI engines say about your brand

### Launch is {{days_until_launch}} days away.

You'll be the first to know. Watch your inbox.

{{founder_name}}
```

**File 4: docs/launch/emails/04-launch-day.md**

```
# Email 4: We're LIVE!

**Subject:** We're LIVE — your founding member access is ready
**Trigger:** Launch day
**From:** Founder Name <hello@citedby.ai>

---

Hi {{name}},

The wait is over. **CitedBy.ai is live!** 🚀

[**→ Get your access now**](https://citedby.ai)

{{#if founding_tier_top100}}
As a Founding Member (#{{signup_number}}), your **lifetime 30% discount** is automatically applied when you choose any plan.
{{/if}}

{{#if founding_tier_top500}}
As an Early Adopter (#{{signup_number}}), your **3 months free on Pro** are ready to activate.
{{/if}}

### We're also live on Product Hunt today!

If you have 10 seconds, an upvote would mean the world to us:

[**→ Upvote on Product Hunt**](https://www.producthunt.com/posts/citedby-ai)

### What you can do right now:

1. **Run your free AI visibility audit** — See your score across 5 AI engines
2. **Explore the dashboard** — Monitor how AI bots interact with your site
3. **Generate optimizations** — Use our tools to improve your AI citations

Thank you for being part of this journey from day one.

Let's get you cited by AI. 🎯

{{founder_name}}
Founder, CitedBy.ai
```

Create all 4 files using Write tool. Do not commit.

content.text:
Perfect! I've successfully created all 4 email template markdown files in `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\docs\launch\emails\`:

1. **01-welcome.md** — Welcome email triggered immediately after signup, introducing CitedBy.ai and founding member/early adopter perks
2. **02-value-aeo.md** — Day 3 follow-up explaining the AEO concept and why AI visibility matters
3. **03-social-proof.md** — Day 7 momentum update showcasing waitlist growth and platform features
4. **04-launch-day.md** — Launch day announcement with access links and special founding member benefits

Each file includes:
- Clear subject line for email sending systems
- Trigger timing
- Sender information
- Handlebars template variables ({{name}}, {{signup_number}}, etc.) for dynamic personalization
- Conditional logic for different user tiers (founding vs. early adopters)
- Markdown formatting for clean content structure

All files are ready for integration with your email marketing system. As requested, I have not committed these files.
